PIP_EXISTS_ACTIONz2Could not find an activated virtualenv (required).z
The directory '%s' or its parent directory is not owned or is not writable by the current user. The cache has been disabled. Check the permissions and owner of that directory. If executing pip with sudo, you should use sudo's -H flag.z
2020-resolverz
--use-feature=2020-resolver no longer has any effect, since it is now the default dependency resolver in pip. This will become an error in pip 21.0..)
